name: subtr-actor-player
description: Replay player library for subtr-actor Rocket League replay workflows

scripts.generate:raw-types: sh -lc 'root=$(cd ../.. && pwd -P) && out="$root/js/player/src/generated" && mkdir -p "$out" && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" collector::replay_data::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" collector::replay_data_heuristics::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" replay_types::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" stats::calculators::flip_reset::export_bindings --lib && env TS_RS_EXPORT_DIR="$out" TS_RS_IMPORT_EXTENSION=ts cargo test --manifest-path "$root/Cargo.toml" ts_bindings::export_bindings --lib && find "$out" -type f -name "*.ts" -exec sed -i "s/[[:space:]]\+$//" {} +'
scripts.verify:raw-types: sh -lc 'root=$(cd ../.. && pwd -P) && generated="$root/js/player/src/generated" && snapshot=$(mktemp -d) && trap "rm -rf \"$snapshot\"" EXIT && if [ -d "$generated" ]; then cp -r "$generated/." "$snapshot/"; fi && ../scripts/with-clean-npm-env.sh node --run=generate:raw-types && diff -ruN "$snapshot" "$generated"'

author: Ivan Malison <ivanmalison@gmail.com>
